security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://www.youtube.com https://s.ytimg.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https://i.ytimg.com https://img.youtube.com; frame-src https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://www.youtube.com; media-src 'self'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.youtube.com https://s.ytimg.com http://localhost:5191; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' http://localhost:5191; img-src 'self' data: https://i.ytimg.com https://img.youtube.com http://localhost:5191; frame-src https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://www.youtube.com ws://localhost:5191 http://localhost:5191

bundle.longDescription: A local-first desktop app for taking timestamped notes on YouTube videos.
